mnemonics.title: GPIO Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: GPIO = Gateway for Physical Interaction Online - recall its role connecting Pi to sensors and actuators

mnemonics.title: Python GPIO Libraries
mnemonics.content: RSG - RPi.GPIO (standard), smbus2 (I2C sensors), gpiozero (simplified objects) - three essential libraries

mnemonics.title: Pin Number Confusion Fix
mnemonics.content: BCM = Brain Chip Mapping (logical numbers), BOARD = Body pin positions (physical layout)

mnemonics.title: Code Safety Checklist
mnemonics.content: SCRE - Sudo for permissions, Cleanup GPIO on exit, Resistors for LEDs, Error handling with try/except
